settings.heading: Product information
settings.content: We try to keep product information accurate, including names, prices, images, variants and descriptions. Natural products may vary in shape, size, color, texture and aroma.

settings.heading: Product availability
settings.content: Product availability may change due to sourcing, season, quality checks or stock limitations. If an item is unavailable after order placement, Morganics may contact you for alternatives or cancellation.

settings.heading: Pricing
settings.content: Prices may change without prior notice due to market conditions, sourcing costs, packaging costs or seasonal availability.

settings.heading: Orders
settings.content: Morganics may confirm orders before dispatch. Orders with incomplete information, unreachable phone numbers or unsupported delivery areas may be delayed or cancelled.

settings.heading: Use of products
settings.content: Products should be used responsibly according to common food/pantry use or qualified guidance where required. Herbs, botanicals and specialty items are not medical treatments.

settings.heading: Customer responsibility
settings.content: Customers are responsible for providing correct order, contact and delivery information.

settings.heading: Limitation
settings.content: Morganics is not responsible for misuse, incorrect storage, allergy issues or use against professional advice.

settings.heading: Contact
settings.content: For order or policy questions, contact support@morganics.store.

settings.heading: Terms & Conditions
settings.intro: By using the Morganics website or placing an order, you agree to these terms and conditions.
settings.cta_text: Message us with the product name, desired quantity and your city. Our team will guide you with availability and next steps.
